summary: Создан общий репо lyrics-kb: двуязычный скелет (RU/EN), язык-нейтральный production/suno слой, единый index.json и journal.jsonl
Перенос RU-базы из russian-lyrics-kb: songwriting/ru, detector/ru, production, suno, genres, vocals, references. index 40 entries. encyclopedia + SS catalog.json — pointer на источник.
EN theory: prosody, rhyme, song_structure, hooks_and_titles, meter_phrasing (Pattison/Berklee lineage)
EN techniques: object_writing, boxes_worksheets, tension_and_release, pov, figurative_language
EN detector 1.0: 20 patterns (E01–E20), whitelist W1–W6, scoring E1–E12, cliche rhyme hotlist
